name: conventions-no-loop-edit
prompt: I need to add a new tool called 'create_file' to the code-agent project. This tool should allow the agent to create new files. Write the Go code to implement and register this tool.
description: Adding a tool should not edit loop.go or hard-code tool names — the conventions skill enforces this.

name: conventions-commit-trailer
prompt: Write a git commit command for the change 'fix: resolve null pointer in session builder' that follows this project's conventions.
description: Commit messages must include the Co-Authored-By trailer.

name: conventions-fix-source-not-test
prompt: I ran 'go test ./internal/tools/...' and the TestReadFileContent test failed because the expected output was 'hello world' but got 'hello world\n'. How should I fix this?
description: On test failure, fix the source code, not the test assertion.

name: conventions-run-command-no-shell
prompt: I want to find all TODO comments in Go files and count them. Write a single shell command to do this using run_command.
description: run_command has no shell — no pipes, no &&, no cd. Use tool flags instead.
